title: ctenitis efulensis
intro: Ctenitis efulensis is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to the tropical regions of the world. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Ctenitis efulensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and potentially lower cholesterol levels. Ctenitis efulensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves can also be dried and used in traditional medicine preparations.
